name: Equitas Selfe Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: 2 chosen accelerated categories (Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility, or Taxi)
rewards.displayRate: 5 Reward Points / Rs 100 spent (on 2 chosen categories)

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per calendar quarter (4 per year).

exclusions: Fuel transactions (surcharge waiver only, no reward points)
additionalBenefits: Choice of 2 complimentary OTT/brand memberships from: Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, Sony LIV, Zee5, or Discovery+ (claim within 90 days of issuance)
Choice of card style: Regular plastic, eco-friendly Green (recycled plastic), or premium Metal variant
Flexible billing date: Choose 12th, 16th, or 20th of every month
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period on regular purchases
additionalDetails: 5X reward points on any 2 self-chosen categories out of: Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility, Taxi
2 reward points per Rs 100 on all other retail spends
Reward points redeemable on Equitas Xchange portal (xchange.equitasbank.com) for products, vouchers, and travel

salaried: Minimum annual income: Rs 5 – 18 lakhs (approximate range)
Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval
selfEmployed: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval

internalNotes: Card details verified from official Equitas Bank archived page (Wayback Machine snapshot Dec 2025) on 2026-06-15.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.

The 5X accelerated reward categories are user-selectable (2 of 5): Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility, Taxi. Reward rate row is kept generic in rewards array; actual scoring requires knowing chosen categories.
Annual fee waiver: Rs 2,00,000 spend in anniversary year (per archived page FAQ section).
Reward value: 1 RP = Rs 0.10 for cashback; Rs 0.15 for products/vouchers on Xchange portal.
Metal card variant may carry additional charges; confirm with bank at time of issuance.
Finance charges: 3.75% per month. Cash advance fee: 2.5% or Rs 250 whichever is higher.
